top.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
top.summary: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

top.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
top.summary: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.

top.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
top.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

top.title: OpenAI faces criminal probe over role of ChatGPT in shooting
top.summary: The firm, co-founded by Sam Altman, said it is "not responsible" for the attack at Florida State University

top.title: Ofcom investigating Telegram over child sexual abuse material concerns
top.summary: The popular messaging service told the BBC in a statement it "categorically denies Ofcom's accusations".

top.title: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
top.summary: How Ternus responds to challenges facing Apple will go a long way to deciding the tech giant's future, writes Zoe Kleinman.
